subject: style(theme): redesign to dark minimal with per-project accent colors
body:
Strip the saturated color palette (sky blue, indigo, emerald) down to
near-monochrome neutral grays. The base theme becomes a backdrop — project
cards are now the only colored elements on the page, each with a distinct
brand accent color.

Theme: all @theme tokens are now neutral grays (#0a0a0a through #e5e5e5).
Cards: accent color drives left border, initials placeholder, tech badges,
and "View Project" link via inline style (required for data-driven colors).

Tags: styling, theme, projects, visual-identity
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-redesign
Semver: minor
